package rulecoverage

func NegativeRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuse() string {
    ruleID := "rows_to_struct_allocation_per_row_without_reuse"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "New struct allocated for each row scan instead of reusing a scratch variable."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
